title: Advanced Panel
summary: Biomarkers Tested Complete Blood Count: Hematocrit, Hemoglobin, RBC Count, WBC Count, and more. Advanced Lipid Profile: Total Cholesterol, LDL, HDL, Triglycerides, and advanced lipid fractions. Hormonal Insights: Testost
descriptionHtml:
Biomarkers Tested

  • Complete Blood Count: Hematocrit, Hemoglobin, RBC Count, WBC Count, and more.

  • Advanced Lipid Profile: Total Cholesterol, LDL, HDL, Triglycerides, and advanced lipid fractions.

  • Hormonal Insights: Testosterone (Free and Total), SHBG, Cortisol, and more.

  • Metabolic Health: Glucose, Insulin, Hemoglobin A1c, and more.

  • Electrolytes and Minerals: Sodium, Potassium, Calcium, Magnesium, and more.

  • Urinalysis: Comprehensive urine tests including Creatinine, Albumin, and more.


What these markers are testing for: 

  • Antinuclear Antibodies (ANA) Screen

images.alt: Unlock the secrets to your health and longevity with our Advanced Blood Panel, a comprehensive suite of blood and urine tests designed for deep analysis and insights. Developed by leading longevity doctors and personally utilized by Bryan Johnson, this panel is a cornerstone of his health protocol. With convenient access to over 2,500 labs across the USA, making informed decisions about your well-being has never been easier.

summary: Biomarkers Tested Complete Blood Count: Hematocrit, Hemoglobin, Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin (MCH), Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin Concentration (MCHC), Mean Corpuscular Volume (MCV), Mean Platelet Volume (MPV), Platelet Cou

  • Complete Blood Count: Hematocrit, Hemoglobin, Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin (MCH), Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin Concentration (MCHC), Mean Corpuscular Volume (MCV), Mean Platelet Volume (MPV), Platelet Count, Red Blood Cell (RBC) Count, Red Cell Distribution Width (RDW), Basophils, Lymphocytes, Monocytes, Eosinophils, White Blood Cell Count, Neutrophils

  • Advanced Lipid Profile: Total Cholesterol, LDL Cholesterol, HDL Cholesterol, Triglycerides, HDL Large, LDL Medium, LDL Particle Number, LDL Pattern, LDL Peak Size, LDL Small, Lipoprotein Fractionation, Non-HDL Cholesterol

  • Comprehensive Metabolic Panel: Alanine Transaminase (ALT), Albumin, Alkaline Phosphatase (ALP), Aspartate Transaminase (AST), Blood Urea Nitrogen (BUN), Creatinine, Estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate (eGFR), Globulin, Glucose, Potassium, Sodium, Total Bilirubin, Total Protein, and more

summary: Our groundbreaking At-Home Microplastics Blood Test Kit is the first of its kind, offering a comprehensive screen for all detectable microplastics in the human bloodstream. This innovative test allows you to assess your
descriptionHtml:
Our groundbreaking At-Home Microplastics Blood Test Kit is the first of its kind, offering a comprehensive screen for all detectable microplastics in the human bloodstream. This innovative test allows you to assess your exposure to these pervasive pollutants without ever leaving your home. Using cutting-edge technology, each self-collected sample is meticulously analyzed for microplastics, providing you with detailed insights into your body's microplastic load.

The test results include the number and size-distribution of microplastic particles detected,, and a calculated concentration of plastic particles in your bloodstream, as well as how your microplastic load compares to others who’ve taken the test. Our method is peer-reviewed and independently approved, ensuring the highest standards of accuracy and reliability. This kit is perfect for health-conscious individuals concerned about environmental and nutritional exposure to microplastics, and anyone interested in understanding their body's interaction with modern pollutants.

Our all-inclusive kit covers everything you need for a hassle-free testing experience. The cost includes shipping of the kit to your doorstep, an easy-to-use at-home blood collection kit, sample preparation, shipping costs of the test to the qualified analysis lab,  full analysis, and secure delivery of comprehensive results. With quick turnaround times, you'll have access to your results promptly, empowering you to make informed decisions about your health and lifestyle.


Take charge of your health with the innovative At-Home Microplastics Blood Test Kit, the first of its kind designed to assess your exposure to microplastic particles and their potential effects on human health. This comprehensive screening detects microplastics in the bloodstream, providing a detailed understanding of your body’s interaction with these pervasive pollutants found in plastic materials, plastic products, and more.

Our advanced testing methodology analyzes your sample for various polymer types, including PVC, polystyrene, polyethylene, and polypropylene—key components of plastic waste and textiles. The results reveal the quantification of plastic particles, their size distribution, and how your microplastic load compares to others who’ve taken the test. Peer-reviewed and independently validated, the process meets the highest quality control standards to ensure accurate and reliable data.

Microplastics are found in diverse environments, from surface waters, estuaries, and marine environments to freshwater, sediments, and aquatic habitats. These pollutants pose significant risks to ecosystems, biota, and human health as they contaminate drinking water, infiltrate wastewater, and enter the food chain through supplements and other sources. Studies by researchers such as Wang and Bryan Johnson have highlighted the global impact of plastic pollution, microplastic ingestion, and their threats to sustainability and natural habitats.

This test empowers you with critical insights into your exposure to microplastics and their potential health effects, offering valuable information for anyone concerned about environmental and nutritional contaminants. Whether you’re addressing microplastic pollution in the USA, China, or globally, this kit provides the tools to understand your exposure and contribute to broader initiatives tackling plastic waste.

The kit includes everything needed for a seamless experience, from at-home filtration and sample collection to professional laboratory analysis of microplastic particles using advanced microscopy. You’ll receive a detailed report on your microplastic load and exposure levels, securely delivered in a timely manner. With free shipping to and from our regulatory-approved labs, this test ensures a smooth process from start to finish.

Join the effort to combat plastic pollution and understand its effects on human health and the environment. The At-Home Microplastics Blood Test Kit is your first step toward informed decision-making for a healthier future and a more sustainable planet.

title: Speed of Aging
summary: Do you know how fast or slow you’re aging? Find out with a simple at home test. Once you know, you will be empowered by data to make lifestyle, exercise and diet changes to slow your rate of aging. Blueprint’s Speed of A
descriptionHtml:
Do you know how fast or slow you’re aging? Find out with a simple at home test. Once you know, you will be empowered by data to make lifestyle, exercise and diet changes to slow your rate of aging. Blueprint’s Speed of Aging test uses state-of-the-art DNA methylation science to reveal your biological speed of aging. 

By understanding your pace of aging, you can make informed decisions to improve your health and longevity. Whether you’re concerned about early aging, or simply want to optimize your wellness strategy, the Speed of Aging offers the insights you need to take meaningful action.

Developed by leaders in epigenetic research, the Speed of Aging test is trusted by top universities and researchers worldwide. With easy at-home sample collection and secure online results, it’s never been easier to measure and manage your aging process.

title: Spout
summary: The Blueprint Automatic Olive Oil Pour Spout is made from Stainless Steel and fits most oil bottles, making it a perfect choice for your kitchen. A stainless steel spout is a perfect way to protect your EVOO and enjoy fr
descriptionHtml:
The Blueprint Automatic Olive Oil Pour Spout is made from Stainless Steel and fits most oil bottles, making it a perfect choice for your kitchen.

A stainless steel spout is a perfect way to protect your EVOO  and enjoy freshness for longer!

This self-closing pour spout makes this spout superior to a regular spout or stopper.

This versatile olive oil pour spout is not just for olive oil, it also works well with balsamic vinegar and other salad dressings. 

Fits most oil bottles, Extra virgin olive oil bottles, Vinegar bottles, Balsamic Vinegar bottles.

This great spout would make an excellent gift set with our best seller Blueprint EVOO. It’s a great addition to your first order of EVOO, ensuring your oil maintains it’s nutrient value for longer.
